message:
tests(e2e/combinator): remove unused imports; silence dead_code in MockLease

These E2E combinator tests are routinely run under strict warning settings (e.g. clippy -D warnings), so even small unused items break CI/dev loops.

Changes:
- Remove unused imports from loser drain + race unit tests (Duration/Counter).
- Keep MockLease::resource_id for realism/debuggability while explicitly allowing dead_code so the test module stays warning-clean.

No behavioral changes intended; this is warning hygiene only.
